body:
# Linch Zhang

**Role:** Visiting Scholar

Alongside his work at Forethought, Linch Zhang is a fund manager at the Long-Term Future Fund, and writes [The Linchpin](https://linch.substack.com/), a newsletter on epistemology, economics, and evolutionary biology. Previously, he was a researcher at Rethink Priorities. He has also worked as a software engineer at Google.
text: Linch Zhang Role: Visiting Scholar Alongside his work at Forethought, Linch Zhang is a fund manager at the Long-Term Future Fund, and writes The Linchpin, a newsletter on epistemology, economics, and evolutionary biology. Previously, he was a researcher at Rethink Priorities. He has also worked as a software engineer at Google.
